title: Automate Item Creation with Subitems
excerpt:
I am trying to create an automation that copies an item AND its subitem to a new board based on a status change. 
When the status of a Sales Opportunity gets moved to “Won” on the Opportunities board, I want it to create…

posts.author: tlachter (Taryn Lachter)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to create an automation that copies an item AND its subitem to a new board based on a status change.

When the status of a Sales Opportunity gets moved to “Won” on the Opportunities board, I want it to create a new item in my All Accounts board and copy over various item columns, and create a subitem and copy over various subitem columns.

This does not seem to be possible even with the Subitem Automations app. Does anyone have workarounds that do not include Zapier?

posts.author: trevor13 (Trevor Chauvin-DeCaro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there, how about one of these workarounds?

Option 1: Use the Item Duplication + Status Workflow

  1. Create a hidden holding board with the same structure as your “All Accounts” board.
  2. Use the automation:
    3.When status changes to “Won” → Duplicate item to [Holding Board] including subitems*
  3. Then use:
    5.When item is created in [Holding Board] → Create Item in [All Accounts]* and mirror the needed columns.
  4. While subitems won’t automatically map over to the final board, this keeps a historical copy with subitems you can reference or mirror into dashboards.

Option 2: Use Connected Boards and Mirroring

Instead of physically copying subitems:

  1. Create a Subitems Board (standalone board) with a “Parent Item” link.
  2. Use Connect Boards + Mirror Columns so each “All Accounts” item mirrors its related subitems dynamically.
  • When an Opportunity is marked “Won,” the new account item is created, and subitems remain connected via a linked field.
  1. This keeps all subitem data visible without requiring duplication.

Option 3: Monday Apps Marketplace

While Zapier and Make.com are the go-to solutions, some Monday apps can help:

  • General Caster: Can perform automation-like calculations and updates.
  • Item and Subitem Duplicator by Vepion (Marketplace app): Allows some multi-board copying, though still limited.
